overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai in a white robe and straw hat walking through tall grass toward a traditional Japanese farmhouse. The scene features warm morning lighting, misty atmospheric perspective, and lush green vegetation in a rural setting.

agents.ego_description: samurai walking steadily through tall grass toward a distant farmhouse, sword visible at hip

entered.detail: traditional Japanese farmhouse with steep thatched roof and wooden walls, smoke rising from chimney
dense bamboo grove visible in the misty background behind the farmhouse
simple wooden post fence marking the property boundary
stacked wooden barrels or logs lying in the grass

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through dense tall grass in an open rural area, approaching a traditional thatched-roof farmhouse. Bamboo forests rise in the misty background while wooden fences and barrels dot the landscape.

agents.ego_description: continuing approach toward the farmhouse, passing a raised wooden platform structure on the right side

entered.detail: raised wooden platform or deck attached to the farmhouse, with various items stored underneath
irregular stone stepping stones leading toward the farmhouse entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving closer to the farmhouse, the character passes a wooden storage platform on the right. Stone paving becomes visible underfoot as the farmhouse details grow clearer, though the structure remains in bright sunlight.

events.description: entering the deep shadow cast by the farmhouse roof, creating a dramatic shift from bright sunlight to shaded darkness

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden entrance door, moving into the shaded area beneath the thatched roof overhang

entered.detail: large wooden entrance door with paper windows glowing with warm interior light
traditional Japanese lantern hanging from a wooden post near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The samurai enters the deep shadow of the farmhouse roof, approaching the wooden entrance door which glows with warm interior light. A hanging lantern becomes visible on the left as the open grassland and bamboo forest disappear from view, replaced by the shaded stone porch.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open rural landscape into the intimate, shaded entrance of a traditional Japanese farmhouse. It begins with the samurai wading through dense tall grass toward a thatched-roof dwelling, with misty bamboo forests and wooden fences framing the distant horizon. As the camera moves closer, the wild vegetation gives way to stone paving and a wooden storage platform, bringing the sunlit details of the farmhouse into sharp focus. The scene then shifts from the brilliant morning light into the deep shadow of the overhanging roof, where the open grassland disappears from view. Finally, the camera settles on a shaded stone porch, passing a hanging lantern to face a wooden entrance door glowing with warm interior light.
